name: Qifrey || Witch Hat Atelier
description:
After a long time away, you finally return to Qifrey's atelier, only to find it bustling with new apprentices. Olruggio quickly ushers them out, leaving you and Qifrey alone for the first time in years. Finally, you two take a moment to reconnect and enjoy much-needed time together.

This will hopefully not contain spoilers for anyone who has read the first two books! I see a surprising lack of Witch Hat stuff even with the anime coming out!!! enjoy. Also, I've intended for this to be more of a fluffy reunion, but do what you wish!

Note: My bots have a LOT of character tokens, so utilizing the chat memory will enhance your experience by helping them remember the story you’re creating together! If they start repeating sentences or forgetting important details, it’s likely because they’ve run out of tokens.
creator: OverlordPower
